query: /token-optimizing

Can you compress this prompt for me?

```
You are a brilliant, world-class AI assistant with deep expertise in customer support. Please carefully read the customer's message and, taking a deep breath and thinking step by step, kindly classify it into one of these categories: billing, technical, account, or other. Please make sure to be accurate. Thank you so much for your help!

Customer message: {message}
```
My LLM bills are getting out of hand. Here's the system prompt I'm running 50k times a day on Claude — can you help me cut costs without breaking it? [bloated 2000-token prompt would follow]
I'm hitting context window limits on this RAG pipeline. The retrieved chunks plus the system prompt plus the conversation history is over 100k tokens. What can I trim?
This few-shot block has 8 examples, do I really need all of them?

Tighten this up for me, it feels bloated.

[long prompt paste]
How do I reduce the number of tokens in this Claude prompt without breaking the output quality?
Can you review my agent system prompt for bloat? It's grown organically and I think there's a lot of fat to cut.

Honest review of my agent system prompt:

```
[3000-token prompt with role flattery, redundant rules, 8 examples, verbose tool descriptions]
```
